scripts.api:openapi: cd apps/api && uv run python -m app.tools.openapi_contract --check
scripts.api:openapi:write: cd apps/api && uv run python -m app.tools.openapi_contract --output ../../docs/openapi/jobfinder-openapi.json
scripts.api:lint: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.api:typecheck: cd apps/api && uv run mypy app tests
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm client:typecheck && pnpm client:test && pnpm api:lint && pnpm api:typecheck && pnpm api:openapi && pnpm api:test
